title: Kaichinam Kaichineswarar Temple
tagline: Kaichinam Kaichineswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Kaichinam Kaichineswarar Temple (கைச்சனம் கைச்சினேஸ்வரர் கோயில் ) is a Hindu temple located at Kachanam in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Kaichinam Kaichineswarar Temple (கைச்சனம் கைச்சினேஸ்வரர் கோயில் ) is a Hindu temple located at Kachanam in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Kaichinam. The temple is dedicated to Shiva, as the moolavar presiding deity, in his manifestation as Kaichineswarar. His consort, Parvati, is known as Palvalai Nayaki.

topPlaces.name: Alathambadi
topPlaces.description: Alathambadi is a large village located in Thiruthuraipoondi of Thiruvarur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Valivalam
topPlaces.description: Valivalam is a small town in Nagapattinam district, Tamil Nadu, India. Now the Valivalam village have the new small man helping nature-made forest which is initiated by pasumai valivalam amaippu (environmental volunteers group) in July 2019 with 2500+ trees of 70-75 variety of species in nearly 20000 sq.ft of formerly degraded land by using akira miyawakki method, especially majority of fruit bearing species to attract birds.

topPlaces.name: Kannayariamudayar Temple, Thirukkarayil
topPlaces.description: Kannayiranathar Swamy Temple, Thirukkarayil (also called Tirukarahil or Tirukarayil) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in Thirukaravasal in Nagapattinam district of Tamil Nadu, India. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is believed to have been built during the Cholas period in the 9th century CE. Shiva is worshipped as Kannayiranathar and his consort Parvathi as Kailasanayaki.

topPlaces.name: Thiruthangur Vellimalainathar Temple
topPlaces.description: Thiruthangur Vellimalainathar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Thiru Thangur in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva, as the moolavar presiding deity, in his manifestation as Vellimalainathar.

topPlaces.name: Vaimoornathar Temple, Tiruvaimur
topPlaces.description: Vaimoornathar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva located in Tiruvaimur in Tiruvarur district of Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is revered in the hymns of 7th-century-CE Tamil saivite poets, Appar and Campantar and is classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam (No:124).

topPlaces.name: Brahmapureeswarar Temple, Thirukkuvalai
topPlaces.description: Brahmapureeswarar Temple or Thirukolili is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in Thirukkuvalai in Nagapattinam district of Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshiped as Brahmapureeswarar, and is represented by the lingam and his consort Parvati is depicted as Vandamar Poonguzhali.

topPlaces.name: Sundaresvarar Temple, Kundayur
topPlaces.description: Sundaresvarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located at Kundaiyur in Nagapattinam district in Tamil Nadu (India).

topPlaces.name: Nadutariappar Temple, Kanrappur
topPlaces.description: Nadutariappar Temple, Kanrappur is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located at Kanrappur near Tiruvarur, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is incarnated by the hymns of Appar and is classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam.

items.note: Alathambadi is a large village located in Thiruthuraipoondi of Thiruvarur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

Valivalam is a small town in Nagapattinam district, Tamil Nadu, India. Now the Valivalam village have the new small man helping nature-made forest which is initiated by pasumai valivalam amaippu (environmental volunteers group) in July 2019 with 2500+ trees of 70-75 variety of species in nearly 20000 sq.ft of formerly degraded land by using akira miyawakki method, especially majority of fruit bearing species to attract birds.

Kannayiranathar Swamy Temple, Thirukkarayil (also called Tirukarahil or Tirukarayil) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in Thirukaravasal in Nagapattinam district of Tamil Nadu, India. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is believed to have been built during the Cholas period in the 9th century CE. Shiva is worshipped as Kannayiranathar and his consort Parvathi as Kailasanayaki.

Thiruthangur Vellimalainathar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Thiru Thangur in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva, as the moolavar presiding deity, in his manifestation as Vellimalainathar.

Vaimoornathar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva located in Tiruvaimur in Tiruvarur district of Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is revered in the hymns of 7th-century-CE Tamil saivite poets, Appar and Campantar and is classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam (No:124).

Brahmapureeswarar Temple or Thirukolili is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in Thirukkuvalai in Nagapattinam district of Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshiped as Brahmapureeswarar, and is represented by the lingam and his consort Parvati is depicted as Vandamar Poonguzhali.
Sundaresvarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located at Kundaiyur in Nagapattinam district in Tamil Nadu (India).

Nadutariappar Temple, Kanrappur is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located at Kanrappur near Tiruvarur, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is incarnated by the hymns of Appar and is classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kaichinam Kaichineswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kaichinam Kaichineswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kaichinam Kaichineswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (106 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (109 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kaichinam Kaichineswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kaichinam Kaichineswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kaichinam Kaichineswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Kaichinam Kaichineswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kaichinam Kaichineswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Alathambadi, Valivalam, Kannayariamudayar Temple, Thirukkarayil, Thiruthangur Vellimalainathar Temple, Vaimoornathar Temple, Tiruvaimur.
